questions.assertion: Assertion (A): Temperature decreases with an increase in altitude.
questions.reason: Reason (R): This is because atmospheric pressure decreases with an increase in altitude, resulting in lower temperature.

(B) Both A and R are true but R is not the correct explanation of A
(C) A is true but R is false
(D) A is false but R is true

questions.assertion: Assertion (A): High-pressure systems are associated with fair weather.

questions.assertion: Assertion (A): The Coriolis effect is responsible for the rotation of weather systems.

(B) Both A and R are true but R is not the correct explanation of A
